layoutRegions.name: exception-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: At-a-glance counts for expired exceptions, upcoming expirations, stale justifications, and ready removals.

layoutRegions.name: approval-queue
layoutRegions.purpose: Keyboard-focusable rows for expiring temporary access approvals and their resource owners.

layoutRegions.name: removal-evidence
layoutRegions.purpose: Evidence panels for downstream entitlements, owner renewal queues, notifications, and rollback guardrails.

components.name: ExceptionRow
components.purpose: Focusable access exception row with owner, expiration, resource, and justification context.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states expose row selection
expiration tone is shown with semantic danger, warning, info, or success

components.name: ImpactCard
components.purpose: Compact downstream entitlement impact panel for rollback-safe exception removal planning.
interactions: tone label stays visible without overlapping text
card sizing remains stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: RollbackList
components.purpose: Ordered removal checklist for safe exception expiry and restoration.
interactions: primary removal action has visible hover and focus-visible states
guardrail numbers are stable and token-colored

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
